generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Rotary encoder attached to the motor shaft of the MABI MAX 100 first rotary axis, measures motor angular position."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPosDataTransmitted
]
instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Rotary encoder attached to the gearbox output shaft of the first rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPosDataTransmitted
]
instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor electrical current I_M on the first rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData I_MDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorPosDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]
instance GearboxPosDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]
instance I_MDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]
instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]
instance OmegaDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]
instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]
instance SimulatedMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorDynamicsSimBlock
]
instance SimulatedGearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearwheelDynamicsSimBlock
]
instance SimulatedOutputPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CycloidalGearboxSimBlock
]
instance MotorPosData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw motor angular position data transmitted via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPosDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorDataProcessor
]
instance GearboxPosData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw gearbox angular position data transmitted via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPosDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorDataProcessor
]
instance I_MData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw motor current data transmitted via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData I_MDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorDataProcessor
]
instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque (τ) calculated from dynamics model and streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorDataProcessor
]
instance OmegaData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity (ω) calculated from dynamics model and streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OmegaDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorDataProcessor
]
instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration calculated from dynamics model and streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorDataProcessor
]
instance SimulatedMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor position generated by the motor dynamics Simulink block."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedMotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]
instance SimulatedGearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox position generated by the gearwheel dynamics Simulink block."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedGearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]
instance SimulatedOutputPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output shaft position generated by the cycloidal gearbox dynamics Simulink block."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedOutputPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]
instance MotorDynamicsSimBlock : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink block modeling the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]
instance GearwheelDynamicsSimBlock : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink block modeling the gearwheel dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]
instance CycloidalGearboxSimBlock : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink block modeling the cycloidal gearbox dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]
instance CoulombViscousFrictionSimBlock : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink block implementing the Coulomb‑viscous friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]
instance StribeckFrictionSimBlock : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink block implementing the Stribeck friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]
instance DahlFrictionSimBlock : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink block implementing the Dahl friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]
instance LuGreFrictionSimBlock : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink block implementing the LuGre friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]
instance SensorDataProcessor : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom processing component linking sensor streams to simulation models and providing insights."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionUpdateService, ResidualAnalysisService, WearTrendMonitoringService, RealTimeDashboardService, DataAggregationService
]
instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine executing motor, gearbox, and friction models to generate simulated traces."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]
instance FrictionUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service continuously updates joint friction models and provides friction parameters to the robot controller."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight, UpdateFrictionParametersAction
]
instance ResidualAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing residuals between simulated and actual signals to suggest controller tuning."
    DTDFVocab:provides ResidualAnalysisInsight, ControllerTuningAction
]
instance WearTrendMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service monitoring wear trends and recommending maintenance scheduling."
    DTDFVocab:provides WearTrendInsight, ScheduleMaintenanceAction
]
instance RealTimeDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real‑time visualization of simulation and sensor data on a dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]
instance DataAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service aggregating and linking continuous data traces."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLinkInsight
]
instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service calibrating simulation models against real data during operation."
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationInsight, CalibrationAction
]
instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing updated friction parameter values for controller tuning."
]
instance ResidualAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight highlighting discrepancies between simulation and real sensor data."
]
instance WearTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating wear progression and potential failure."
]
instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing real‑time visualization of sensor and simulation data on the dashboard."
]
instance DataLinkInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming successful linking and aggregation of data traces."
]
instance CalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight detailing calibration adjustments applied to simulation models."
]
instance UpdateFrictionParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action automatically updating friction parameters in the robot controller."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance ControllerTuningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action suggesting controller tuning adjustments based on residual analysis."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance ScheduleMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action scheduling maintenance based on wear trend analysis."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance CalibrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action executing automatic calibration of simulation models against live data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance AxisDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, CurrentSensor, SensorDataProcessor, SimulationEngine, FrictionUpdateService, ResidualAnalysisService, WearTrendMonitoringService, RealTimeDashboardService, DataAggregationService, ModelCalibrationService, MotorDynamicsSimBlock, GearwheelDynamicsSimBlock, CycloidalGearboxSimBlock, CoulombViscousFrictionSimBlock, StribeckFrictionSimBlock, DahlFrictionSimBlock, LuGreFrictionSimBlock, MotorPosData, GearboxPosData, I_MData, TorqueData, OmegaData, AccelerationData, SimulatedMotorPositionData, SimulatedGearboxPositionData, SimulatedOutputPositionData
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time data streaming (millisecond granularity) via MQTT; simulation models run synchronously with physical operation to produce continuous prediction traces; continuous friction model updating during the robot’s operating cycle"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of data sources (sensors) feeding into a processing component; the component runs simulation models to produce output traces; these traces are aggregated into the digital shadow (purpose FrictionDerivation) and exposed via an MQTT‑based dashboard, all coordinated through the AAS for contextual information"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin spans the design (structural SysML models), the manufactured (simulation models of motor and gearboxes), and the operated stages (real‑time data acquisition and friction identification during normal robot use)"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time identification compensates for wear, temperature and load variations; traceability of each data point back to its source and processing stage; validation performed by comparing simulated and measured torque and angular velocity; uncertainties arise from unmeasured intermediate gearwheel outputs and from model approximations of friction physics"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol used for bidirectional data transmission between the physical robot’s sensors and the digital twin’s processing component, with Asset Administration Shell providing contextual metadata within the same network topology"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Utilizes SysML for modeling, Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for semantic asset description, and MQTT as the messaging protocol – all conforming to industry standards for interoperability"
]
